overview: Farm72 is a premium organic e-commerce site selling pure cold-pressed oils (Coconut, Sesame, Mustard, and more) using traditional Kacchi Ghani methods. Features a modern hero carousel, product catalog, cart system, Stripe checkout, and WhatsApp order backup.
features: Hero carousel with organic farming imagery
5 product catalog (Coconut Oil, Sesame Oil, Black & Yellow Mustard Oil, Sugarcane Juice)
Cart system with real-time badge and localStorage persistence
Checkout with Stripe payment and WhatsApp backup order
Product detail pages with quantity selector
Contact page with form and location info
Organic green theme, responsive design, hover effects
